'package:flutter/material.dart'; import 'package:google_fonts/google_fonts.dart'; import 'package:provider/provider.dart'; import 'login_screen_model.dart'; export 'login_screen_model.dart'; class LoginScreenWidget extends StatefulWidget { const LoginScreenWidget({super.key}); static String routeName = 'LoginScreen'; static String routePath = '/loginScreen'; @override State createState() => _LoginScreenWidgetState(); } class _LoginScreenWidgetState extends State { late LoginScreenModel _model; final scaffoldKey = GlobalKey(); @override void initState() { super.initState(); _model = createModel(context, () => LoginScreenModel()); } @override void dispose() { _model.dispose(); super.dispose(); } @override Widget build(BuildContext context) { return GestureDetector( onTap: () { FocusScope.of(context).unfocus(); FocusManager.instance.primaryFocus?.unfocus(); }, child: Scaffold( key: scaffoldKey, backgroundColor: FlutterFlowTheme.of(context).primaryBackground, body:
